John works as a doctor at a local hospital. He has been informed that there is an outbreak of a highly contagious disease in his town. John's patients are convinced and decide to get vaccinated. As a result, the disease outbreak is contained and does not spread further in the community. This real-world use case highlights the importance of understanding the science behind vaccinations and how it can be used to protect our health.
